description_long: This is a large, irregularly shaped natural boulder with a roughly triangular profile and a rounded apex. Its surface is rugged and uneven, featuring a mix of earthy tones including tan, reddish-brown, and pale beige, with some darker weathered patches and lighter streaks. The rock sits atop a circular base of light-colored, patterned paving stones, suggesting intentional placement in a landscaped or urban environment. The texture appears coarse and granular, with visible indentations, crevices, and natural weathering marks. The mass and size of the rock indicate it would serve as a substantial physical barrier or decorative element. There are no visible carvings, graffiti, or artificial modifications on its surface.
description: A large, rugged natural boulder with a mix of tan, reddish, and pale beige hues, set on a circular paved base. Its coarse, weathered surface and substantial size make it a prominent urban landscape feature.
description_view_0: The rock appears broad and rounded with a prominent weathered patch and a visible indentation near the top.
description_view_1: This side shows a taller, more elongated profile with a darker, reddish-brown surface and fewer visible indentations.
description_view_2: The rock looks steep and upright, with a mix of dark and light patches and a pronounced vertical ridge.
description_view_3: This view reveals a smoother, lighter surface with subtle striations and a gentle curve along the back.
attribute_integration_with_urban_infrast: The rock is intentionally placed on a circular paved base, indicating use as a landscaping or barrier element.
